nasb.text: He shall lay his hand on the head of the male goat and slay it in the place where they slay the burnt offering before the Lord; it is a sin offering.

esv.text: and shall lay his hand on the head of the goat and kill it in the place where they kill the burnt offering before the Lord; it is a sin offering.

cnv.text: 要按手在山羊的頭上，然後在宰燔祭牲的地方，在耶和華面前宰殺牠，這是贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 他要把手放在羊头上，在杀燔祭牲的地方，在耶和华面前宰羊。这是他的赎罪祭。
